meaning: vt.提交,谈及,归诸于,指点把...提交,使求助于vi.提到,涉及,查阅,咨询
examples: You may refer to your notes if you want.
They come from Tuam, a place they refer to on the title track of their album, "All the Way From Tuam."
May I refer you to my letter of 14 May?
Some just refer to it as the new city or Delhi s tech city.
They would be much less likely to refer to a woman as a genius.
